creator: oly@world.std.com
text:
I've made a port for cops 1.04.  I was unable to find any
        clear statement on copying restrictions.  I was also unable
        to find the author's web page (if any).  I'll look again
        later - until then, I'm not sure if it's OK to distribute
        for a fee.

	cops is a system security checking program.  I did not
	implement password checking, though I am looking into
	adding MD5 support to the cops routines.
